text:
In the first space, the emptiness and angles make me feel slightly disoriented and alone, as if I am both observer and an object being observed. It’s quiet, institutional, with a sense of waiting looming in the air.

In the second space, bright lights and creative displays wake my curiosity. The presence of text about misunderstanding and longing resonates with my own uncertainties, yet also offers comfort; I am not alone in feeling exposed. This place feels reflective, playful, yet tinged with existential questioning.
